response.justification: Bogdan's extensive experience in software development, particularly in web, mobile, and embedded systems, does not align closely with the Principal Performance Architect role focused on SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, and deep-learning workload analysis. His background lacks direct involvement in hardware-software co-design, AI accelerator architecture, or performance bottleneck analysis for AI workloads.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in high-performance, low-latency systems.
Proven ability to work across full-stack development and optimize complex systems.
Extensive technical leadership and open-source contributions, demonstrating technical versatility.
concerns: No explicit experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, or deep-learning workload optimization.
Lacks required educational qualifications (PhD, Master's, or Bachelor's with 8+ years) for the role's technical depth.
No documented work in SIMD/MIMD architecture, GPU workload analysis, or hardware-software co-design.
